Announce yourself before entering another skater's pattern
Coaches must check in at the front desk
No hockey stops on freestyle ice
freestyle.notes: OhioHealth Ice Trails at Polaris is a seasonal outdoor rink near the Polaris Fashion Place mall, open November through February. Part of the OhioHealth Ice Trails system operated by Columbus Recreation and Parks.
